modification_notice: Selected and normalized source fields, preserved unresolved compound cells without delimiter splitting, classified conversion and identity candidates, excluded ambiguous bare terms, deduplicated evaluation cases, and added benchmark metadata; no records were imported into the zhtw product dictionaries.
known_biases: The source is an academic terminology table, not naturally occurring sentence text or a representative sample of Taiwan product usage.
Only structurally atomic, non-conflicting bare terms are scored; excluded compound and ambiguous terms may make the evaluated subset easier than the full source dataset.
A unique mapping in this dataset does not prove that a Chinese bare term is unambiguous in every domain or sentence context.
The track measures computer terminology compatibility and cannot independently support a general market-best accuracy claim.
